analysis: Loos & Co. is a manufacturer of wire rope, aircraft cable, cable assemblies, wire rope fittings/hardware, coated cable, and CNC-machined components for aerospace, defense, military, automotive, marine, and medical industries.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures wire rope and cable products including stainless steel, galvanized, and carbon steel wire rope for multiple industries.
codes.evidence: Wire Rope When looking for the highest quality domestic Wire Rope in stainless steel, galvanized, bright carbon steel and a variety of other alloys, we deliver.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures fittings and accessories for wire rope, hose, pipe, and tube applications.
codes.evidence: Hardware & Fittings​ Loos & Co., Inc. has long been a manufacturer of high-quality wire rope fittings and accessories for a variety of industries.

codes.description: Cable, Cord, Wire Assemblies; Communications Equipment
codes.reasoning: The company manufactures cable assemblies for aerospace, defense, and communications equipment applications.
codes.evidence: Cable Assemblies​ We maintain large inventories of both bare and coated cable as well as fittings to satisfy your immediate needs.

codes.reasoning: The company supplies aerospace and defense cables and cable assemblies that are used in airframe structural components and systems.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.

codes.reasoning: The company performs CNC machining to manufacture MIL-Spec hardware including fasteners and fittings supplied to major distributors.
codes.evidence: A recognized leader in the field of Mil-Spec hardware and wire rope fittings, our CNC parts supply to most major distributors and industries around the globe.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures commercial hardware and fittings for a variety of industries including marine, automotive, and architectural.
codes.evidence: Manufacturing and distributing wire, wire rope and cable, cable assemblies, fasteners and tools around the world at our various locations and subsidiaries.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures non-electrical wire including stainless steel and galvanized carbon steel aircraft cable and wire rope.
codes.evidence: Loos and Company manufactures and stocks aircraft cable to commercial and military specifications in stainless steel, galvanized carbon steel, and a variety of other alloys.

codes.reasoning: The company serves the marine industry with wire rope and cable products that may be used in ship and marine equipment.
codes.evidence: With a focus on precision and versatility, our wire and cable products cater to the unique demands of various industries, including but not limited to: Aerospace Learn More > Architecture Learn More > Automotive Learn More > Marine Learn More >
